name: Fetishlab
description:
my first bot. Basically just a sandbox.

It’s a mashup of some of my favorite fetishes and includes references to some of my favorite artists and works.

Includes latex, dronification, transformation (kinda), bondage, hypnosis, and the like.

I thought it was decent, so I made it public. I probably won’t make any more bots

Not optimized at all, so it has tons of tokens. messy, but it works... kinda. just use a .7 heat to keep things more consistent.

Picture made from 88stacks

Any feedback for features and optimizations are appreciated.

Update: optimized some of the character and personality.
creator: DistilledWater
